Till There Was You - The Beatles | Karaoke Version ...
The only Broadway song that The Beatles covered. Peggy Lee's version of "'Til There Was You" was a minor hit in the UK in
1961. Paul McCartney's cousin, Bett Robbins, drew his attention to that song. McCartney said, "I had no idea until much
later that it was from 'The Music Man'."
